Retroactive authorization approved following successful appeal. Original MRI claim denied 2025-02-18 for missing prior auth. Appeal decision overturned denial — medical necessity confirmed based on knee X-ray findings and clinical exam.
Prior authorization approved for knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy. MRI confirmed medial meniscus tear right knee. Conservative treatment (6 weeks PT, NSAIDs) failed. Surgery medically necessary.
